name: unite-group
description: Unite-Group — the single canonical monorepo for the entire Unite-Group product and ecosystem. apps/web is the product; everything else supports it.

scripts.verify:web: cd apps/web && corepack pnpm@9.15.0 install --frozen-lockfile && corepack pnpm@9.15.0 run type-check && corepack pnpm@9.15.0 run lint && corepack pnpm@9.15.0 run test && node ../../scripts/verify-web-ci-build.mjs
scripts.verify:workspace: cd apps/workspace && corepack pnpm@9.15.0 install --frozen-lockfile && corepack pnpm@9.15.0 exec tsc --noEmit && corepack pnpm@9.15.0 run test && corepack pnpm@9.15.0 run build
scripts.verify:autopilot: cd apps/autopilot-runner && npm ci && npm run test && npm run type-check && npm run build && npm run verify:container
scripts.verify:mcp: cd packages/pi-ceo-operator-mcp && npm ci && npm run build
scripts.verify:spine: cd packages/spine/packages/spine && npm ci && npm run typecheck && npm test
scripts.verify:spec-board: cd apps/spec-board && npm ci && npx tsc --noEmit && npm test && npm run build
scripts.verify: npm run verify:readiness && npm run verify:docs-watch && npm run verify:docs-review && npm run verify:web && npm run verify:workspace && npm run verify:autopilot && npm run verify:mcp && npm run verify:spine && npm run verify:spec-board
